title: Hiring Medical Officer at Drishti Eye Care

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Drishti Eye Care
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
